visible_bad_hover: to say (to speak, make a statement, issue a decree, etc.)
corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: finite perfect plural token needs exact-address review before a concise contribution such as 'they said' can be authored
what_failed: A populated hover inherited the Qamus dictionary spread for the root instead of preserving the finite verb form.
sarf_lesson: For finite verbs, record aspect, voice, person, number, and suffixes before accepting any hover. An infinitive or omnibus entry definition is not a token gloss.
nahw_lesson: Sentence role and speaker context come after sarf has preserved the finite verb contribution; they cannot certify a dictionary spread as a hover.
learner_explanation: قَالُوا is a finite plural verb. A learner needs to see that it means a group said something, not the abstract entry 'to say'.
drill_prompt: Given قَالُوا, name the finite verb features that a hover must preserve before it can be rich-certified.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: exact token must preserve the plural subject and attached object pronoun, e.g. 'they wronged Us/us' where certified
what_failed: The visible hover omitted the attached object suffix and reduced the token to a root/lemma meaning.
sarf_lesson: Verb suffix pronouns are visible morphology. They must appear in the parse key and learner-facing breakdown.
nahw_lesson: The object pronoun is part of the clause relation; context may decide capitalization/referent, but the suffix cannot vanish.
learner_explanation: The final نَا in ظَلَمُونَا contributes 'Us/us'. A hover that says only 'to wrong' hides part of the word.
drill_prompt: Segment ظَلَمُونَا into verb host, subject marker, and object suffix, then write the minimum hover contribution.

visible_bad_hover: Satan, the Devil; devil; literally to be far away from Allah’s mercy
corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: exact token must preserve plural host plus possessive suffix, such as 'their devils/shayatin' where certified
what_failed: A concept/etymon entry spread occupied the token hover and hid plural number plus possessor.
sarf_lesson: For noun hosts, preserve number and attached possessive suffix before semantic concept notes. Etymon prose is not a hover.
nahw_lesson: The possessive relation must be visible or explicitly pending; context can refine referent after sarf accounts for the suffix.
learner_explanation: شَيَٰطِينِهِمْ contains a plural host and 'their'. The hover should teach the token, not a paragraph about the concept.
drill_prompt: Rewrite شَيَٰطِينِهِمْ as a host-plus-possessor breakdown and identify why concept prose is unsafe as best hover text.

corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: exact token must preserve lām, article, plural host, and jar-majrūr relation before a concise phrase can be authored
what_failed: Component evidence recognized the host but did not certify the composed written token or the lām relation.
sarf_lesson: Component candidates from lām/article/host segmentation are not whole-token Qamus entry candidates and cannot weaken the gate.
nahw_lesson: The lām and governed plural noun form a PP/jar-majrūr structure whose attachment/function must be certified.
learner_explanation: لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ is not just 'angels'; it includes a lām relation plus the definite plural host.
drill_prompt: For لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ, list each visible component and state why component-only evidence cannot be auto-propagated.

visible_bad_hover: good, beautiful, excellent, best, good-doer, goodness
corrected_hover_or_pending_reason: pending: classify the maṣdar and case role before replacing the family spread with a concise token contribution
what_failed: A maṣdar token received an omnibus semantic-family hover that mixed adjectives, doers, elatives, and nouns.
sarf_lesson: A maṣdar is an action noun. It must be classified before selecting an English shape.
nahw_lesson: The accusative role can be reviewed only after the maṣdar shape is preserved; iʿrāb cannot certify a mixed semantic spread.
learner_explanation: إِحْسَانًا is a maṣdar/action noun in this token, not every meaning of the ح س ن family at once.
drill_prompt: Given إِحْسَانًا, reject the family-spread hover and write the blocker that must be cleared before live repair.
